title: Arches Package Manifest
description: Schema for an arches-packages manifest file describing an Arches extension or application.

name.description: PyPI package name, or a unique slug if not on PyPI. Use lowercase with hyphens.

kind.description: Whether this is a core extension, an application, or a developer tool.

summary.description: One-sentence description of what the package does (140 chars max).

repository.description: URL of the source repository (GitHub, GitLab, etc.).

pypi.description: PyPI package name if published. Omit if not on PyPI.

maintainers.description: List of GitHub usernames or org names responsible for this package.

arches_versions.description: PEP 440 version specifier for compatible Arches versions, e.g. '>=8.0,<9.0'.

domains.description: High-level subject domains this package targets.

tags.description: Freeform tags for search and filtering (lowercase, hyphen-separated).
